name: BEN_ELIG_DPNT
description: BEN_ELIG_DPNT identifies the eligibility status of a person's contacts who have the personal relationship flag selected.  This information is updated when an electable choice is created for a person or when the determine dependent eligibility process is run.

columns.Name: DPNT_INELIG_FLAG
columns.Comments: Dependent ineligible flag Y or N.

columns.Name: CVRD_FLAG
columns.Comments: 'Y' When user covers the dependent

columns.Name: RLNSHP_CD
columns.Comments: This column indicates RLNSHP_CD

columns.Name: ELIG_DPNT_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column

columns.Name: CREATE_DT
columns.Comments: This column indicates Created date.

columns.Name: ELIG_STRT_DT
columns.Comments: This column indicates Eligibility start date.

columns.Name: ELIG_THRU_DT
columns.Comments: This column indicates Eligibility through date.

columns.Name: OVRDN_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column indicates Overridden Y or N.

columns.Name: OVRDN_THRU_DT
columns.Comments: This column indicates Overridden through date.

columns.Name: INELG_RSN_CD
columns.Comments: This column indicates Ineligible reason.

columns.Name: ELIG_PER_ELCTBL_CHC_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to BEN_ELIG_PER_ELCTBL_CHC.

columns.Name: PER_IN_LER_ID
columns.Comments: This column holds Foreign Key to BEN_PER_IN_LER.

columns.Name: ELIG_PER_ID
columns.Comments: This column holds Foreign key to BEN_ELIG_PER_F.

columns.Name: ELIG_PER_OPT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to BEN_ELIG_PER_OPT_F.

columns.Name: ELIG_CVRD_DPNT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to BEN_ELG_CVRD_DPNT.

columns.Name: DPNT_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_NAME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the package name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: PROGRAM_APP_NAME
columns.Comments: This column indicates PROGRAM_APP_NAME

columns.Name: PROGRAM_NAME
columns.Comments: This column indicates PROGRAM_NAME

columns.Name: PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Concurrent Program who column - date when a program last updated this row).

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENDED_ELIG_CVRD_DPNT_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates ENDED_ELIG_CVRD_DPNT_ID

columns.Name: CTFN_REQD_FLAG
columns.Comments: To display meaningful messages and provide more information on selection pages

columns.Name: PCP_DSGN_CD
columns.Comments: This column indicates PCP  code
